user_query: For fathers greek food filled day, please add a classic american breakfast option.

fields.name: Classic American Breakfast Plate
fields.short_description: A hearty plate with scrambled eggs, turkey bacon, whole-grain toast, and roasted breakfast potatoes — a familiar, balanced American-style morning meal.
fields.meal_suggestion: Scramble two eggs with a splash of milk and a pinch of salt and pepper. Pan-roast small diced potatoes with a little olive oil, onion, and paprika until golden and crisp. Cook turkey bacon until crisp. Toast a slice of whole-grain bread and serve with a small spread of butter or avocado. Plate eggs, bacon, potatoes, and toast together; add a side of fresh fruit (berries or an orange segment) for brightness.
fields.nutrition_note: Provides balanced protein from eggs and turkey bacon, complex carbohydrates and fiber from whole-grain toast and potatoes, and healthy fats if avocado is chosen. Adding fresh fruit boosts vitamin C and fiber. Choose turkey bacon and moderate portion sizes to control sodium and saturated fat.

result.reasoning: Day 1 breakfast currently features Greek/Mediterranean options; adding a Classic American Breakfast Plate provides a familiar, hearty alternative. Position -1 appends it after existing breakfast choices.
